step_description: Top wait statistics since last SQL Server restart
narrative_hint: LCK_M_S (shared locks) at 42% of total waits confirms lock contention is the dominant historical pattern on this server, not just a current event. CXPACKET at 18% confirms parallelism is consistently contributing to waits. The high LCK_M_S count (48,420 tasks) suggests this ETL vs OLTP conflict is a recurring daily pattern, not a one-time event. Claude should recommend both immediate (reschedule ETL) and permanent (RCSI isolation level) fixes.
